title: The VALIS Trilogy
author: Philip K. Dick
card_summary: An omnibus edition collecting Dick's final three novels: VALIS (1981), The Divine Invasion (1981), and The Transmigration of Timothy Archer (1982). These works represent Dick's most autobiographical and theologically ambitious fiction, directly drawing on his 2-3-74 mystical experiences. Houghton Mifflin Harcourt edition in AZW3 format.

assets.path: PaulPKDarchive/PKDpdf/Dick, Philip K - The VALIS Trilogy (2011, Houghton Mifflin Harcourt) - libgen.li.azw3
